subcodes.first_line: O 'Inayatu'llah! Divine bounties are all-encompassing. Among His favors is His attention unto thee from the precincts of the Prison, and likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عنایه الله عنایت الهی شاملست یکی از عنایاتش توجهش بتو از شطر سجن و همچنین
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
